N,j=526410+-526409,L[-420677+420678]while j do M[j],N=M[j]-(132553-132552),N+(-205159-(-205160))if 390537-390537==M[j]then M[j],w[j]=nil,nil end j=L[N]end end,function(L,N)local c=v(N)local S=function(S,O)return j(L,{S,O},N,c)end return S end,{},function(L,N)local c=v(N)local S=function(S,O,J)return j(L,{S;O,J},N,c)end return S end,function(L,N)local c=v(N)local S=function(S,O,J,I,H,w,M)return j(L,{S;O;J,I;H;w,M},N,c)end return S end,function(L)for N=488110+-488109,#L,-109911+109912 do M[L[N]]=(88833-88832)+M[L[N]]end if S then local j=S(true)local c=J(j)c[N(561669+-608217)],c[N(6374-52851)],c[N(630629+-677167)]=L,t,function()return 273678+-513953 end return j else return O({},{[N(-660271-(-613794))]=t,[N(330093-376641)]=L,[N(-123212+76674)]=function()return 28274-268549 end})end end,function(L,N)local c=v(N)local S=function(S,O,J,I,H)return j(L,{S,O;J;I,H},N,c)end return S end,function(L,N)local c=v(N)local S=function(S)return j(L,{S},N,c)end return S end return(d(213802+15745696,{}))(c(H))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[N(-1021174-(-974676))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
